clusters.justification: These terms converge on cortico-subcortical affective circuits, including the amygdala and anterior insula, which orchestrate physiological and emotional responses to valenced states and stimuli.

These concepts share robust co-activation patterns within frontostriatal and ventromedial prefrontal pathways that compute subjective significance to guide motivated, goal-directed behavior and behavioral choice.
These terms systematically map onto networks supporting internally directed, stimulus-independent thought involved in self-projection, autobiographical anchoring, and the modeling of social agents.
